hero.title: Wejha Project 2026
hero.slogan: Your good choice is the beginning of your journey
hero.sponsor: Under the auspices of the Libyan Red Crescent — Benghazi Branch

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The Wejha Story
about.description: "Wejha" project is an educational, awareness-raising, and training initiative launched in 2023 that aims to empower secondary school students to make conscious and well-studied academic decisions regarding their university majors, and to support them psychologically and skill-wise to transition to university life.
about.timeline_subtitle: From idea to impact — Wejha's story across the seasons
about.s1_desc: Wejha launched for the first time — laying the first bricks in understanding the needs of Benghazi's students and establishing the project's foundation.
about.s2_desc: Coverage expanded to more students. Wejha delivered its first training workshops and capacity-building sessions.
about.s3_desc: Full digital transformation, mapping the mindset and concerns of an entire generation.
about.s4_desc: University Expo, specialized training tracks, and a fully integrated digital platform.
about.volunteers_desc: Behind Wejha is a dedicated team of Libyan Red Crescent volunteers who work with passion and sincerity to support and guide our youth toward their future paths. This project would not have been possible without their continuous giving and dedication.
about.obj_academic_desc: Assisting high school students in identifying their career inclinations and choosing suitable university majors.
about.obj_capacity_desc: Organizing training workshops and developmental seminars based on real field data regarding demanded skills.
about.obj_data_desc: Utilizing field surveys to map the mindset, questions, and concerns of high school students.
about.obj_digital_desc: Building a comprehensive digital platform to manage events, register participants, track attendance, and provide interactive guidance.

stats.title: 2026 Student Survey
stats.subtitle: Key Analytical Field Indicators
stats.intro: During May 2026, the Wejha team conducted a comprehensive field survey targeting high school students in Benghazi. The data from 1,928 students across 27 schools was compiled and archived.

media.videos_desc: Watch success stories and guidance from inspiring doctors, engineers, and academics.
media.seasons_desc: Visual showcase of previous seasons' activities and preparation for Season 4.

tracks.title: Training & Capacity Building Tracks
tracks.subtitle: Specialized Training Programs for High School Students in 2026
tracks.description: Wejha project focuses on offering three integrated training tracks designed to empower students and develop their personal, academic, and technical skills to prepare them for post-secondary life and the future job market.

footer.description: A strategic youth guidance and developmental project empowering Libyan high school students to make informed academic and career choices.

volunteers.appreciation: Special appreciation goes to the dedicated Red Crescent volunteers who meticulously archived and verified all 1,928 paper survey forms:

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Wejha Project & training tracks
faq.a1: Wejha Project is a strategic youth guidance and developmental initiative operating under the auspices of the Libyan Red Crescent — Benghazi Branch. It aims to empower high school students to select their university majors and build essential life skills.
faq.q2: Who is eligible to participate in Wejha?
faq.a2: The project is open to all secondary school students (1st, 2nd, and 3rd year students) in both the scientific and literary tracks across public and private schools in Benghazi.
faq.q3: Are there any registration or training fees?
faq.a3: No, all training tracks, interactive workshops, mentorship sessions, and university field trips are completely free of charge, sponsored fully by the Libyan Red Crescent.
faq.a4: Students can register online through Wejha's official digital platform when registration phases are announced.
faq.q5: Will I receive a certificate after completing the training?
faq.a5: Yes, every student who successfully completes their chosen training tracks will receive an official certificate of participation and completion accredited by the Libyan Red Crescent Benghazi Branch.
faq.q6: What makes Wejha different from other guidance initiatives?
faq.a6: Wejha is data-driven; it relies on actual field surveys of thousands of students to address real needs, and combines theoretical guidance with hands-on soft skills training, digital literacy, and direct site visits to universities.
